scripts.dev: npm run build:music && node scripts/build-asset-manifest.js --root public --out public/asset-manifest.json && vite --host 0.0.0.0
scripts.build: npm run build:music && node scripts/build-asset-manifest.js --root public --out public/asset-manifest.json && vite build && node scripts/build-asset-manifest.js --root dist --out dist/asset-manifest.json
